name: overkill-marketplace
description: A marketplace containing the overkill skill: advanced, maximalist alternatives to whatever problem is being discussed, ranked on a calibrated complexity scale.

plugins.name: overkill
plugins.description: Surfaces advanced data structures, distributed-systems algorithms, niche frameworks, design patterns, and frontier tooling that go beyond the pragmatic answer. Each option is scored on a calibrated complexity scale with the concrete scenario in which it pays off.
